name: David Nichtern
bio: David Nichtern is a senior teacher in the Shambhala Buddhist tradition and a four-time Emmy Award-winning composer and producer. He is a lineage holder in the Kagyu/Nyingma tradition and studied under Chögyam Trungpa Rinpoche. He is the author of 'Creativity, Spirituality, and Making a Buck' and hosts the 'Creativity, Spirituality & Making a Buck' podcast. He founded Dharma Moon and teaches at the Shambhala Mountain Center and other venues.
